metadata.title: Synaply - Jàng baat yi ak IA & Njiitalu Fattali
metadata.description: Yookal sa xam-xamu làmmiñ ak njiitalu fattali bu IA di njiite. Sos say sarsu baat walla jàng ci sarsu mbooloo yi ñu séddoo.
metadata.keywords: jàng angale, njiitalu fattali, defaru baat yi, flashcards, jàng làmmiñ ak IA, sarsu baat yi, app bi ñuy jàng làmmiñ, jàng espagnol, jàng français, jàng allemand, xam-xam ci làmmiñ, jàng baat yi, SRS jàng
metadata.og_title: Synaply - Jàng Baat yi ci Lu Xereñ
metadata.og_description: Yookal sa xam-xamu làmmiñ ak njiitalu fattali bu IA di njiite. Jàngal bu gaaw, fattaliku bu yàgg.
metadata.og_image_alt: Xar-kanamu Synaply App bi ñuy Jàngé Làmmiñ ak IA
metadata.twitter_title: Synaply - Jàng Baat yu Bees ci Lu Nééw-Doolé
metadata.twitter_description: Àndal ak Synaply ngir yaatal sa xam-xamu baat yi ci njiitalu fattali bu xereñ ak IA.

common.title: Koj
common.footer_help_text: Help us improve! Share your ideas, report bugs, or request features:

dashboard.title: Bérabu liggéey
dashboard.subtitle: Jàng {target} ci {source}
dashboard.community_lists_desc: Seet sarsu baat yu mbooloo mi ak sarsu xam-xam yu yeneen jàngkat yi.
dashboard.ai_practice_desc: Yookal sa xam-xamu baat yi ci tekkil ay sarsu baat yu IA sàkk, nekk ci koj walla sa sarsu baat.
dashboard.manage_words_desc: Xool, seet, soppi walla far baat yi ci sa mbooloo.
dashboard.import_success: Baat yi dugg nañu bu baax!
dashboard.import_error_retry: Mënuloon denc sa baat bu bees. Nañu jéemaat beneen yoon!
dashboard.add_word_success: Baat bi yooku na bu baax!
dashboard.select_topic_error: Tannal koj walla nga bind sa dëkk bi bopp.
dashboard.ai_translation_notice: IA dina la dimbali ci maanaa mi ak sarsu baat bi
dashboard.delete_confirm: Ndax dëgg la nga bëgg far baat bi?
dashboard.delete_all_confirm: Ndax dëgg la nga bëgg far LÉPP sa limbub baat yi? Mënuloo dellu ginnaw ci loolu.
dashboard.no_words_found: Gisuloo benn baat. Jéemal beneen baat walla nga yook ay baat!
dashboard.no_words_for_lesson: Gisuloo benn baat ngir jàng. Yookal baat yu bees ci sa lim bi!
dashboard.no_words_to_review: Amuloo benn baat ngir fattaliku tey. Dellusi ginnaw walla nga yook ay baat yu bees!
dashboard.lesson_complete_desc: Liggéey bu baax! Fattaliku nga sa baat yi ngir tey.
dashboard.practice_setup_desc: Bindal koj ngir sàkk ay sarsu baat yu dëgg ngir yaw dong!
dashboard.practice_topic_hint: Boo ko bàyyee mu neen, dina sàkk ay sarsu baat ci sa xam-xamu baat yi.
dashboard.footer_help_text: Dimbali nu ngir nu baaxal ko! Séddool nu say xalaat, xibaar njuumte yi, walla laaj yeneen xarala:
dashboard.support_desc: Boo bëggee app bi, mën nga jàppale doxalinam.

onboarding.journey_begins: Sa tukk ngir xam làmmiñ tambali na fi.
onboarding.strategy_desc: Ngir gënë jarinòo Synaply, nu ngi la di digal pexe bu yomb bi:
onboarding.step1_desc: Yookal lu tolloo 100 baat yu am genn koj (n.m., Liggéey walla Tukk) ngir sàkk dëkk bu dëgg.
onboarding.step2_desc: Xam baat yi ci repetition bis bu nekk ba ñu dugg ci sa làmmiñ.
onboarding.step3_desc: Dellu ci Tàggatu ak IA ngir jëfandikoo sa baat yu bees yi ci ay sarsu baat yu mat ak dëkk yu dëgg.

dashboard.custom_topic_label: Sa koj walla dëkk bi bopp (optional)
dashboard.custom_topic_placeholder: n.m. Baat yu am solo ngir ndaje liggéey ci wàllu marketing
dashboard.publish_desc: Séddool mbooloo {count} baat yi ak yeneen jàngkat yi. Dina feeñ ci bérabu Sarsu Mbooloo yi.
dashboard.list_title_placeholder: n.m. Baat yu am solo ci IT
dashboard.publish_success: Sarsu baat bi siisu na bu baax!
dashboard.duplicate_word_error: Baat bi "{word}" mu ngi ci lim bi déjà
dashboard.inline_add_error: Bindal làmmiñu njeebant bi ak tekki bi
dashboard.save_batch_success: Denc nga {count} baat ci sa lim bi!
dashboard.save_batch_error: Mënuloon denc baat yi. Jéemaat beneen yoon.
dashboard.remove_duplicates_error: Faral baat yu nekk ñaari yoon laata nga koy denc.
dashboard.remove_duplicates_publish_error: Faral baat yu nekk ñaari yoon laata nga koy siisal.

topics.home: Kër ak Dunda bis bu nekk

ai_word_info.error_coffee_break: IA mu ngi tisi nàan kafe. Jéemaat beneen yoon ci sàtt!
ai_word_info.error_generic: Oops! Mënuloon am xam-xamu IA bi. Nañu jéemaat!

public_lists.title: Sarsu Mbooloo yi
public_lists.subtitle: Seetal sarsu baat yu yeneen jàngkat yi sàkk ngir say làmmiñ.
public_lists.search_placeholder: Seet sarsu yi ci koj walla farammfàtté...
public_lists.loading: Sarsu yu baax yi ñu ngi ñëw...
public_lists.no_lists_desc: Jéemal beneen seet walla nga soppi seetukaay yu làmmiñ yi.
public_lists.load_error: Mënuloon jël sarsu mbooloo yi fi mu nekk nii.
public_lists.playlists_loading: Sarsu xam-xam yi ñu ngi ñëw...

detail.added_success: Baat yi yooku nañu bu baax ci sa mbooloo!
detail.added_error: Mënuloon yook baat yi ci sa mbooloo.
detail.delete_confirm: Ndax dëgg la nga bëgg far sarsu mbooloo bi? Mënuloo dellu ginnaw ci loolu.
detail.delete_success: Sarsu bi far na bu baax!
detail.duplicate_error: Am na baat yu feeñ ñaari yoon ci lim bi. Faral ko laata nga koy denc.
detail.words_in_list: Baat yu nekk ci sarsu bi

profile.terms_welcome: Dalal ak jàmm ci Synaply. Ci jëfandikoo samay xarala, dëggal nga sart yi...
profile.title: Ngalu Xar-kanam
profile.leave_empty: Bàyyil mu neen ngir denc baat-u-jàll bi fi nekk
profile.update_success: Xar-kanam bi beesal na bu baax!
profile.subtitle: Yéwénal say xibaar bopp ak ngalu làmmiñ
profile.terms_beta_warning: Important Beta Notice: Synaply is currently in its beta testing phase. By using this service, you acknowledge that you are participating in a testing period and understand the risks associated with pre-release software.
profile.terms_intro_text: By accessing or using Synaply, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and all applicable laws and regulations. If you do not agree with any of these terms, you are prohibited from using or accessing this site.
profile.terms_beta_text: Synaply is provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis for beta testing purposes. You explicitly acknowledge and agree that: (a) The service may contain bugs, errors, and experience frequent interruptions. (b) We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any part of the service at any time without notice. (c) CRITICAL: During the beta period, we may perform database resets or deletions. This means all your data, including progress, word lists, and account information, may be permanently deleted without prior warning. You are responsible for maintaining your own backups of any important data.
profile.terms_accounts_text: To use certain features, you must register for an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account.
profile.terms_content_text: Our service allows you to post, link, store, share and otherwise make available certain information, text, graphics, or other material. You are responsible for the content you post. Synaply retains all rights to its original content, features, and functionality, which are protected by international copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws.
profile.terms_conduct_text: You agree not to use the service for any unlawful purpose or to solicit others to perform or participate in any unlawful acts. You shall not attempt to interfere with the proper working of the service, including through viruses, denial of service attacks, or any other harmful technology.
profile.terms_liability_text: In no event shall Synaply, nor its directors, employees, partners, or agents, be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential or punitive damages, including without limitation, loss of profits, data, use, goodwill, or other intangible losses, resulting from your access to or use of or inability to access or use the service.
profile.terms_changes_text: We reserve the right, at our sole discretion, to modify or replace these Terms at any time. We will try to provide at least 30 days' notice prior to any new terms taking effect for significant changes. What constitutes a material change will be determined at our sole discretion.
profile.terms_contact_text: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us through the support channels provided on the website.

register.title: Sos sa kont
register.password_hint: War na am lu mat 8 binde

best_practice.title: Pexey Sotti
best_practice.strategy_desc: Ngir njàng mi gënë sotti, nu ngi la di digal pexe bu yomb bi ci 3 jeego:
best_practice.step1_desc: Yookal lu tolloo 100 baat yu am genn koj (n.m., Tukk walla Liggéey) ngir sàkk dëkk.
best_practice.step2_desc: Xam baat yi ci repetition bis bu nekk ba ñu dugg ci sa làmmiñ.
best_practice.step3_desc: Dellu ci Tàggatu ak IA ngir jëfandikoo sa baat yu bees yi ci ay sarsu baat yu mat ak dëkk yu dëgg.

getting_started.title: Tambali
getting_started.desc: Synaply jumtukaay bu am solo la bu ñu defar ngir dimbali la nga yaatal sa xam-xamu baat yi ak baax sa xam-xam ci làmmiñ ci njiitalu fattali ak IA.
getting_started.step1_desc: Yookal baat yi ci sa loxo walla nga jëfandikoo IA ngir sàkk sarsu yi ci koj ak lebeul.
getting_started.step2_desc: Jëfandikool Fattaliku Baat yi ngir jàng baat yi ci njiitalu FSRS.

manual.title: Bind ci Loxo
manual.desc: Bindal baat bi ci làmmiñ bi ngay jàng ak tekkim. Mën nga yook kàddu walla dëkk bi ngir gënë fattaliku.

auto_translate.title: Tekki-bopp
auto_translate.desc: Jëfandikool xarala "Tekki-bopp" ngir tekki bu gaaw ci xaralayu DeepL.

ai_list.title: Sàkk Sarsu (Limbub Baat IA)
ai_list.desc: Tannal lebeul (A1-C2) ak koj, IA (Gemini) dina sàkk sarsu baat yu am solo ngir yaw, boo xamne mën nga ko yook ci sa baat-ukaay ci genn klik.

ai_insights.title: Xam-xamu IA
ai_insights.desc: Ngir bis bu nekk, IA mën na la jox ay baat yu mel ni yooyu, sarsu jëfandikoo, ak xalatu gramer.

spaced_repetition.title: Njiitalu Fattali
spaced_repetition.desc: Synaply mu ngi jëfandikoo njiitalu FSRS (Free Spaced Repetition Scheduler) ngir xalaat waxtu bu gën ngir fattaliku baat bu nekk.
spaced_repetition.step1: Dinañu la wone baat ci làmmiñu njeebant bi.
spaced_repetition.step2: Bindal tekki bi te nga cuq Enter walla Seet Tontu bi.
spaced_repetition.step3: Boo fattalikuwul — cuqal "Fattalikuwuma" ngir xool tontu bi.
spaced_repetition.step4: Njiit mi dina xalaataat bisu fattaliku bi ci sa tontu.

ai_practice.title: Tàggatu ak IA: Tekki Sarsu Baat
ai_practice.desc: Xarala mii mu ngi dimbali ci tàggatu gramer ak dëkk bi ci tekki sarsu baat yu mat yu IA sàkk ngir yaw.
ai_practice.step1: Tannal koj (n.m., "Liggéey", "Tukk") walla nga bàyyi bérab bi mu neen.
ai_practice.step2: IA dina sàkk 5 sarsu baat ci koj bi nga tann.
ai_practice.step3: Duggal sa tekki te nga am farammfàtté bu mat.
ai_practice.step4: IA dina wone say njuumte te digal la tekki bu gën ak farammfàtté.

dictionary_management.title: Yéwénal Baat-ukaay bi
dictionary_management.search: Seet: Jëfandikool bérabu seet bi ngir gaawé gis baat yi ci sa mbooloo.
dictionary_management.sorting: Tann: Xoolal limbu say baat yépp ak sañ-sañu far ko.
dictionary_management.delete_all: Fari lépp baat yi: Sañ-sañu fari lépp sa baat-ukaay ci genn klik.

progress.title: Jeego ak Puun yi
progress.desc: Sa njiit (ci koj app bi) mu ngi wone mbooloo tontu yu dëgg yi nga bind. Bu njiit mi gënë kawe, baat yu gënë bare nga jàng!

not_authorized_admin: You do not have administrator permissions to view this page.
